title: build(deps): bump github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient from 1.8.3 to 1.9.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient](https://github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient) from 1.8.3 to 1.9.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient's releases.

Version compatible with Docker 1.9 and Go 1.4

This has a special tag name to make it clear that it was the latest version compatible with Docker 1.9 and Go 1.4.

  • d637d8c build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#937)
  • 95fbcf3 build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 3.0.2 to 3.1.0 (#935)
  • caa1ef8 build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/go-winio from 0.5.2 to 0.6.0 (#934)
  • 51d0c0e build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#933)
  • f932da6 build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-cmp from 0.5.8 to 0.5.9 (#932)
  • 87747bc Run go fix to fix build tags
  • c4f9819 build(deps): bump github.com/docker/go-units from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 (#931)
  • 157b3c2 build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 3.2.1 to 3.3.0 (#929)
